mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_social WHERE provider = #{provider} AND provider_user_id = #{providerUserId}
SELECT * FROM user_social WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND provider = #{provider}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_social (user_id, provider, provider_user_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{provider}, #{providerUserId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_social WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND provider = #{provider}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO email_verification (user_id, email, token, purpose, frontend_client, expired_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{email}, #{token}, #{purpose}, COALESCE(#{frontendClient}, 'primary'), #{expiredAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE email_verification SET used = 1, used_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refresh_token (user_id, token, expired_at, ip_address, user_agent) VALUES (#{userId}, #{token}, #{expiredAt}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent})
mapper.update: UPDATE refresh_token SET revoked = 1, revoked_at = COALESCE(revoked_at, NOW()) WHERE token = #{token}
UPDATE refresh_token SET revoked = 1, revoked_at = COALESCE(revoked_at, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO native_auth_handoff ( provider, provider_user_id, email, email_verified, display_name, code_hash, handoff_challenge, expired_at ) VALUES ( #{provider}, #{providerUserId}, #{email}, #{emailVerified}, #{displayName}, #{codeHash}, #{handoffChallenge}, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MINUTE) )
mapper.select: SELECT id, provider, provider_user_id, email, email_verified, display_name, code_hash, handoff_challenge, expired_at, created_at FROM native_auth_handoff WHERE code_hash = #{codeHash} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM native_auth_handoff WHERE expired_at <= NOW() ORDER BY expired_at LIMIT 100
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_consent (user_id, consent_type, consent_version, agreed, agreed_at, revoked_at, source) VALUES (#{userId}, #{consentType}, #{consentVersion}, #{agreed}, #{agreedAt}, #{revokedAt}, #{source})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT assignment.permission_code FROM admin_user_permission assignment JOIN admin_permission_policy policy ON policy.permission_code = assignment.permission_code AND policy.active = 1 WHERE assignment.user_id = #{userId} AND assignment.revoked_at IS NULL

SELECT DISTINCT assignment.group_code FROM admin_user_group assignment JOIN admin_permission_group permission_group ON permission_group.group_code = assignment.group_code AND permission_group.active = 1 WHERE assignment.user_id = #{userId} AND assignment.revoked_at IS NULL
